tasks.label: test:mutation:ledger
tasks.command: dotnet tool restore && dotnet stryker; exit_code=$?; echo ""; echo "Relatorio Stryker gerado, se a execucao concluiu com sucesso, em:"; find StrykerOutput -name mutation-report.html -print 2>/dev/null || true; exit $exit_code

windows.command: dotnet tool restore; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { dotnet stryker }; $exitCode = $LASTEXITCODE; Write-Host ''; Write-Host 'Relatorio Stryker gerado, se a execucao concluiu com sucesso, em:'; Get-ChildItem -Path 'StrykerOutput' -Filter 'mutation-report.html' -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName; exit $exitCode

tasks.label: test:mutation:balance
tasks.command: dotnet tool restore && dotnet stryker; exit_code=$?; echo ""; echo "Relatorio Stryker gerado, se a execucao concluiu com sucesso, em:"; find StrykerOutput -name mutation-report.html -print 2>/dev/null || true; exit $exit_code

windows.command: dotnet tool restore; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { dotnet stryker }; $exitCode = $LASTEXITCODE; Write-Host ''; Write-Host 'Relatorio Stryker gerado, se a execucao concluiu com sucesso, em:'; Get-ChildItem -Path 'StrykerOutput' -Filter 'mutation-report.html' -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName; exit $exitCode
